all_violations.description: Factory uses randomUUID for isolation tokens; this can make reruns less reproducible without a captured seed.
all_violations.suggestion: Allow optional seeded token override while keeping random default for collision avoidance.

all_violations.description: Default correlation/csrf IDs use randomUUID which can complicate exact replay diagnostics.
all_violations.suggestion: Expose deterministic override hooks for replay-focused debugging runs.

all_violations.description: Helper seeds webhook/thread data per test but does not expose explicit teardown hook in this helper itself.
all_violations.suggestion: Optionally return cleanup callback or centralize cleanup in fixture teardown when runtime costs are acceptable.

all_violations.description: Case file is 362 lines, above TEA maintainability guardrail, increasing cognitive load and review cost.
all_violations.suggestion: Split into focused modules by risk area (invalid correlation, duplicate suppression, providerEventId guard, replay retry).

all_violations.description: Same seed/bootstrap pattern repeats in multiple suites, creating copy-paste maintenance pressure.
all_violations.suggestion: Extract seed presets per risk profile to reduce repetitive setup argument blocks.

all_violations.description: Automate suite duplicates setup scaffolding with only label/id differences.
all_violations.suggestion: Use table-driven scenario builders to parameterize seed labels, neighbors, and payload mutations.

all_violations.description: Timeline extraction/filter snippet appears repeatedly across files.
all_violations.suggestion: Move timeline extraction to a small helper utility for readability.

all_violations.description: E4 suite does not locally assert invalid-signature ingress refusal; coverage relies on cross-story E1 security lane.
all_violations.suggestion: Add one lightweight E4-local invalid-signature case or traceable cross-story dependency assertion.

all_violations.description: No direct repository-level assertion for orphan-write absence (validated through API contract outcomes).
all_violations.suggestion: Optionally add one backend unit/integration assertion over persistence layer for no-orphan guarantee.

all_violations.description: Each scenario maps number + ensures thread + seeds voicemail, which increases runtime for larger story suites.
all_violations.suggestion: Introduce worker-scoped reusable baseline fixture with per-test overlay when safe.
all_violations.code_snippet: export const bootstrapStoryE4 = async ({ request, numberMappingLabel }) => { ... }

all_violations.description: Most tests perform immediate full thread-detail fetches; this is valuable but can be selectively reduced in some non-read-contract checks.
all_violations.suggestion: Keep full detail assertions for key AC checks and use narrower follow-up checks for purely replay-idempotency paths.
all_violations.code_snippet: const detailResponse = await apiRequest(request, { method: 'GET', path: `${seeded.context.paths.threads}/${seeded.threadId}` });

all_violations.description: Entrypoint-level splitting is good, but selective run tags at test level could further optimize story-focused CI selection.
all_violations.suggestion: Add consistent tags/grep hints for shard-optimized selective runs where applicable.

high_severity_violations.description: Case file is 362 lines, above TEA maintainability guardrail, increasing cognitive load and review cost.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Split into focused modules by risk area (invalid correlation, duplicate suppression, providerEventId guard, replay retry).

top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Split the 362-line guards/replay file into 2-3 focused modules
Introduce scenario preset helpers to cut repeated setup blocks
Factor repeated timeline extraction into helper function
Expose optional deterministic seed inputs in Story E4 context factory for debug/replay runs
Keep random defaults for parallel collision safety and document deterministic overrides
Consider explicit optional teardown helper for deep-isolation stress lanes
Current unique token strategy is appropriate for parallel execution
Add one E4-local ingress-signature refusal case (or explicit trace reference to E1)
Consider one repository-level orphan-write assertion test in module unit tests
Consider worker-scoped seeded baseline fixture for E4 API suites
